topics.name: medical imaging foundation models
topics.pubmed: (medical imaging[Title/Abstract] OR radiology[Title/Abstract] OR MRI[Title/Abstract] OR CT[Title/Abstract]) AND (foundation model[Title/Abstract] OR large language model[Title/Abstract] OR vision transformer[Title/Abstract] OR self-supervised[Title/Abstract])
topics.arxiv: "medical imaging" AND ("foundation model" OR "vision transformer" OR "self-supervised")
topics.crossref: medical imaging foundation model radiology AI

topics.name: radiomics reproducibility
topics.pubmed: (radiomics[Title/Abstract]) AND (reproducibility[Title/Abstract] OR robustness[Title/Abstract] OR external validation[Title/Abstract])

topics.name: liver metastasis imaging AI
topics.pubmed: (liver metastasis[Title/Abstract] OR colorectal liver metastasis[Title/Abstract]) AND (CT[Title/Abstract] OR MRI[Title/Abstract] OR radiomics[Title/Abstract] OR deep learning[Title/Abstract])
topics.arxiv: "liver metastasis" AND (CT OR MRI OR radiomics OR "deep learning")
topics.crossref: liver metastasis CT MRI radiomics deep learning

topics.name: thyroid CT AI
topics.pubmed: (thyroid[Title/Abstract]) AND (CT[Title/Abstract] OR ultrasound[Title/Abstract]) AND (radiomics[Title/Abstract] OR deep learning[Title/Abstract] OR artificial intelligence[Title/Abstract])
topics.arxiv: thyroid CT ultrasound radiomics deep learning
topics.crossref: thyroid CT ultrasound radiomics deep learning artificial intelligence
